title: * Sky layer (gradient/particle effects)
content:
* Sky layer (gradient/particle effects)
* Mid-ground elements (animated scenery)
* Foreground accents (interactive elements)
* Time-of-day transitions
- State-Reactive Filters
* Warm tones → positive interaction
* Cool/chaotic → conflict states
* Blur/clarity → communication quality
```

**Implementation Options**:

|Rendering Approach|Pros |Cons |
|------------------|---------------------------------|-------------------------|
|WebGL/Three.js |Cross-platform, browser-based |Performance overhead |
|Unity/Unreal |High fidelity, native performance|Platform-specific builds |
|Canvas/SVG |Lightweight, accessible |Limited visual complexity|

**Recommendation**: WebGL for investor demos (instant access), with Unity pipeline for production.

#### Layer 2: Avatar Evolution System

**Purpose**: Visual representation of personality development through form
